description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to branches 3.7 and main, on pull requests to those branches, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test multiple languages (cpp, csharp, java, swift, objective-c, python, php, ruby, js) on multiple operating systems (macos, ubuntu, windows), with custom inclusions. Each job checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, builds, and tests the code.
